title: After the death of Kaworu
wikitext:
[]: After the death of Kaworu...             Quote Post by xxtomboxx » Sun Sep 06, 2009 7:30 pm Hi guys, I'm new here. I have a question thats been bugging me for some time. I was wondering if anyone has ever discussed how Kaworu shows up in End of Evangelion. In eps. 24 we all know that he dies. We also know that he has the salvaged soul of Adam within him. So I guess my question is, when Kaworu dies, does the soul of Adam return to his "body" which is now in Gendo's palm? And if so, does this explain the appearance of Kaworu in EoE? I guess this also brings up the question of just what made Kaworu Kaworu? If his "soul" is Adam, then his personality is something separate from that. If Kaworu "dies" by Shinji's hand, is it his soul and personality that are transferred into the Adam embryo? Are the soul of Kaworu and Adam one and the same as a result of the supposed "contact experiment" at the South Pole? And finally, did I just answer my own question as a result of writing down all of my questions in a logical manner so that it makes more sense in my head? haha. whatever the case may be, I thought it would be an interesting topic to discuss for my first official post here. Thanks everybody!

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Sun Sep 06, 2009 8:33 pm Hmm...of further not might be that he was killed in Lillith's chamber, and potentially his remains were never fished out of the LCL...or perhaps Gendo had him fished out and his soul tranplanted back into Adam, like when KFR was retrieved to get Rei/Lillith's sould back for Rei III

[]: Re: After the death of Kaworu...             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Sep 06, 2009 9:07 pm xxtomboxx wrote: when Kaworu dies, does the soul of Adam return to his "body" which is now in Gendo's palm? And if so, does this explain the appearance of Kaworu in EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sun Sep 06, 2009 10:49 pm And if so, does this explain the appearance of Kaworu in EoE?

[]: After the death of Kaworu...             Quote Post by xxtomboxx » Sun Sep 06, 2009 7:30 pm Hi guys, I'm new here. I have a question thats been bugging me for some time. I was wondering if anyone has ever discussed how Kaworu shows up in End of Evangelion. In eps. 24 we all know that he dies. We also know that he has the salvaged soul of Adam within him. So I guess my question is, when Kaworu dies, does the soul of Adam return to his "body" which is now in Gendo's palm? And if so, does this explain the appearance of Kaworu in EoE? I guess this also brings up the question of just what made Kaworu Kaworu? If his "soul" is Adam, then his personality is something separate from that. If Kaworu "dies" by Shinji's hand, is it his soul and personality that are transferred into the Adam embryo? Are the soul of Kaworu and Adam one and the same as a result of the supposed "contact experiment" at the South Pole? And finally, did I just answer my own question as a result of writing down all of my questions in a logical manner so that it makes more sense in my head? haha. whatever the case may be, I thought it would be an interesting topic to discuss for my first official post here. Thanks everybody!
